violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Ice cream prep cooler was not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-freezer was not cleaned as frequently as required.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities Floor in cooking area were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.--Physical facilities Floor Tiles were not maintained in good repair.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
